prestazioni: Engine: FE3N (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) with forged internals including Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost reliably. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) for optimized spool and 350+ HP potential.

Fuel System: Upgraded to a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a Sard 800cc top-feed fuel rail. Use a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom 3D-printed intake manifold adapter for precise AFR control and launch control tuning.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the stock differential housing, paired with a PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset (close-ratio) and a Spec Stage 3+ clutch with billet flywheel. Reinforce the transmission with a Peloquin differential cover and upgraded axles from a Mazda MX-6 GT (1993-1997) for durability.
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders to fit 9.5J ET20 Enkei PF05 wheels (17x9.5) wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40R17 tires. Use OEM-spec Mazda 626 Turbo badges (1988-1992) with gold-plated accents.

Aero: Custom front splitter (3D-printed ABS) with integrated canards from a Rocket Bunny V3 kit (modified for 626 chassis), paired with a Cusco rear wing (Type 2, 1200mm width) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals. Underside diffusers from a HKS GT-SS kit (adapted for 626 floorpan).

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (90s JDM spec) with custom mounting brackets, paired with a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel and a Defi BF Series gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod. Replace door cards with Alcantara-wrapped panels and OEM Mazda 323 GT-X (BG) door handles for a period-correct JDM touch.
